notes: v1 COMPILATION RULES improved vi.mock usage and imports, but ~30% of generated files are empty stubs (allocator.test.ts, scan-engine.test.ts) containing only 'Test cases will be generated here' placeholders with zero actual it() blocks. Judge scored sample generously (0.9+) but corpus analysis reveals the empty stub pattern is the primary failure mode. Pattern consistency improved significantly. Net: +0.20 improvement from baseline (0.475 → 0.675). v1 kept.
hypothesis: v1 improved compilability; v2 will target the empty stub problem — model generates scaffold but fails to write actual test bodies
